project_type: Python quantitative trading system with MQL5 EA output
build_command: python3 -c 'import pandas, numpy, scipy; print("deps ok")'
verification_instructions: Run the full backtest pipeline and verify PnL > 0, drawdown < 10%, Sharpe > 2
snapshot_or_generated_files: Backtest results in hft_scalper/results/, final EA in hft_scalper/output/
setup_instructions: pip install pandas numpy scipy scikit-learn numba
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full package install available. Python 3.11 with pyenv/uv/pip. 367MB tick data file with 6M ticks.
contribution_requirements: Fresh implementation - do NOT reference any existing EA files in the repo
key_patterns: Tick data format: time_msc (unix ms), bid, ask, last, volume, flags, flags_str, volume_real. Data spans April 1-29 2026, ~6M ticks. Price range ~4540-4680 XAUUSD.
directory_structure: tick_data/ contains raw broker ticks. hft_scalper/ will contain all new code (analysis, strategies, backtest engine, optimization, final EA output).
